# Employee Handbook

## Security

All employees must rotate their VPN password every 90 days.
If an employee forgets the VPN password, they must contact the IT help desk and verify their employee ID before a reset is issued.

## Travel

Employees may book economy flights directly if the round-trip fare is under 900 USD.
Any airfare above 900 USD requires manager approval before booking.

## Expenses

Meal expenses are reimbursed up to 45 USD per travel day.
Receipts are required for any single expense over 20 USD.
